data.title: XRP's 2025 Market Dynamics: A Comparison to 2017 Trends
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, the current market conditions for XRP (XRP) differ significantly from those in 2017, despite some analysts drawing parallels between the two periods. The XRP/BTC pair remains substantially below its 2017 peak, stuck in a distribution zone, which has led to skepticism among long-term holders. Analysts, including CRYPTOWZRD and JD, have pointed to historical bullish charts to predict potential price surges, suggesting that XRP's current price structure mirrors its 2017 bull run. During that time, XRP consolidated within a large symmetrical triangle before breaking out and accelerating by over 11,900% in less than a year. Chartists today observe a similar consolidation phase, anticipating XRP to reach a cycle target of $20. However, the conditions in 2025 are vastly different, making a repeat of 2017's gains far from guaranteed.

The sentiment among long-term XRP holders has shifted from euphoria to doubt, as evidenced by the Net Unrealized Profit/Loss (NUPL) data. In 2017, when XRP broke out of its giant triangle and began its significant rally, the long-term holder NUPL entered the Euphoria–Greed zone, indicating that holders were sitting on substantial profits and were confident enough to ride the rally higher. Importantly, sentiment did not slip back into the "Belief–Denial" stage until well after the peak, showing strong conviction during the parabolic rise. In 2025, the situation appears different. Despite a strong rally, the NUPL data shows long-term holders have already moved from Euphoria–Greed down into Belief–Denial, suggesting investors are questioning whether the rally can last, a sign of hesitation rather than conviction. This mood resembles the sentiment in 2021, when excitement gave way to doubt just before the market cooled.

In 2017, XRP's surge in US dollar terms was accompanied by sharp gains against Bitcoin (BTC), with the XRP/BTC pair climbing by more than 3,700% to over 0.00023 BTC within a year. This move reflected XRP's position at the time as one of the few large-cap altcoins offering a payments-focused narrative. In 2025, the structure is different. XRP/BTC has rebounded to around 0.000025 BTC in September from mid-2024 lows near 0.000010 BTC, yet the pair remains about 90% below its 2017 peak. It is further testing a long-term distribution zone at 0.000025–0.000030 BTC, where rallies stalled multiple times between 2019 and 2022. The 2017 ICO-driven surge also had fewer competitors, with XRP being one of the oldest cryptocurrencies. Today, it contends with rivals like Ether (ETH), Solana (SOL), and Sui (SUI), alongside growing stablecoins in the cross-border settlement space. Consequently, achieving five-digit percentage gains as seen in 2017 may prove challenging for XRP bulls this time.

data.title: Sei Ecosystem Protocol Yei Finance Opens TGE Registration, Supports Clovis Users to Participate Simultaneously
data.description: Yei Finance, a leading Sei protocol, has officially launched its TGE registration website, opening airdrop registration at 21:00 (UTC+8) on September 4th. This event is open to liquidity providers, ecosystem partners, and community users of Yei Finance's products. Users who have pre-deposited for the cross-chain liquidity protocol Clovis are also eligible for airdrops. Clovis's next round of pre-deposits will open next week. The TGE registration window runs from September 4th to 30th, and the token ticker is CLO.

data.title: Regulatory Challenges Impact X Money's Operations
data.description: According to PANews, Elon Musk's social media platform X is facing regulatory hurdles with its payment service, X Money. This has led to an increase in employee turnover as the company navigates these challenges.

data.title: Robot Consulting, a US-listed company, plans to spend 1 billion yen to buy ETH
data.description: Robot Consulting, a Japanese company listed on Nasdaq, announced that it plans to use part of its available cash resources to invest in ETH. The investment is expected to begin in the fourth quarter of 2025 and the spring of 2026, with a maximum investment amount of 1 billion yen. The specific timing and amount may be adjusted based on market conditions and strategic considerations. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Etherscan launches Seiscan, a blockchain browser specifically for the Sei network
data.description: Etherscan expands to Sei and launches Seiscan, a dedicated block explorer for Sei Network. Developers and users can now access Sei transaction data, analysis, and APIs through Seiscan. (The Block)

data.title: BlackRock IBIT Bitcoin holdings exceed 750,000
data.description: According to official data, as of September 3, the Bitcoin holdings of BlackRock's Bitcoin exchange-traded fund IBIT have exceeded 750,000 BTC, reaching 750,057.56020 BTC, worth US$84,215,937,827.35.

data.title: Bitget has destroyed 220 million BGB and locked 220 million BGB to a new wallet
data.description: According to official news, BGB announced that it has completed the destruction of 220 million BGB (worth approximately US$1.09 billion) and transferred another 220 million BGB (worth approximately US$1.09 billion) to a new wallet for locking.

data.title: U.S. August S&P Global Services PMI Falls Short of Expectations
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the final reading for the U.S. S&P Global Services PMI in August was 54.5, falling short of the anticipated 55.4 and matching the previous value of 55.4.

data.title: Nasdaq to strengthen scrutiny of cryptocurrency companies: Insider
data.description: Nasdaq is increasing scrutiny of companies listed on its exchange that attempt to boost their stock prices by raising funds to buy and hoard cryptocurrencies, according to people familiar with the matter. The exchange's move could slow the cryptocurrency boom, which is pushing more and more exotic tokens into the mainstream. Nasdaq, where the vast majority of cryptocurrency stocks trade, currently requires some companies to obtain shareholder approval before issuing new shares to buy stock. (The Information)

data.title: U.S. Economic Growth and Inflation Concerns Amid Strong Service and Manufacturing Data
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Chris Williamson, Chief Business Economist at S&P Global Market Intelligence, noted that despite the U.S. services PMI final reading being lower than the initial estimate and below July's level, the August data remains the second strongest this year. Coupled with robust manufacturing PMI performance, these findings suggest that the U.S. economy's annualized growth rate for the third quarter could reach 2.4%.

At the same time, increased orders reflect rising summer customer demand, prompting service providers to hire more employees, with manufacturing also resuming recruitment. However, the positive news on current growth and hiring is overshadowed by concerns about future prospects and inflation. Survey data indicates some downside risks to economic growth in the coming months, while inflation poses an upside risk as import tariffs have impacted goods and services prices.

data.title: Tokenized Assets Poised to Revolutionize Institutional Investments
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, tokenized assets are gaining traction as a blockchain-based trust layer for institutional investors seeking sustainable market opportunities. This development suggests a potential surge of capital into blockchain systems. Real-world asset (RWA) tokenization involves converting financial and tangible assets into digital tokens on a blockchain ledger, offering advantages such as fractional ownership, broader investor access, and continuous liquidity. Corey Billington, co-founder and CEO of Blubird, a tokenization infrastructure firm, highlights that tokenized RWAs provide a tamper-proof trust system absent in traditional and climate finance. Billington emphasized the inefficiencies of the current financial system, stating, "The old system is very slow, very broken, and unfortunately, that’s where most of the market looks at the moment." He further explained that tokenized NFTs act as immutable receipts, enhancing trust and potentially attracting more institutional capital to blockchain platforms.

Recently, Blubird, in collaboration with wealth tokenization platform Arx Veritas, achieved a significant milestone by tokenizing $32 billion worth of Emission Reduction Assets (ERAs), preventing nearly 400 million tons of CO₂ emissions. This event marks the largest tokenization aligned with the Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) framework. The tokenization of ERAs is expected to channel trillions in institutional capital into blockchain-based climate finance. Billington noted that this innovation "creates a lot of new access points for climate finance," which is currently hindered by the inefficiencies of existing systems. A significant challenge is the lengthy verification process for carbon assets, which can take up to 18 months through Verra, a nonprofit standard-setter. Despite these challenges, tokenized RWAs are already facilitating billions of dollars in ESG-aligned initiatives.

Blubird has secured more than $18 billion in tokenization deals through 2026, potentially avoiding another 230 million tons of CO₂ emissions. Billington stated, "We’re looking at roughly 230 million tons of CO₂ prevented emissions equivalent to that additional $18 billion pipeline." If such initiatives materialize, tokenization could become a cornerstone of institutional ESG investment strategies by 2030. This shift underscores the growing importance of blockchain technology in transforming traditional financial systems and advancing sustainable investment practices.

data.title: Greeks.live: Traders are closely watching Bitcoin's potential recovery towards the $120,000 level
data.description: Adam, a macro researcher at Greeks.live, published an English community briefing, stating: "Community sentiment is mixed, with some traders selling call options around current levels to take profits, but remaining cautiously optimistic. The focus remains on BTC, with traders closely watching Bitcoin's potential recovery to $120,000, while IBIT +10 basis points suggests potential strength, posing a challenge to short positions."

data.title: Mega Matrix Files $2 Billion Registration Statement to Advance Stablecoin Governance Token Strategy
data.description: Mega Matrix, a company listed on the New York American Stock Exchange, announced that it has filed a general shelf registration statement (Form F-3) with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to raise $2 billion to support its stablecoin governance token (DAT) strategy, with the goal of building the world's largest stablecoin governance token company. Last week, the company announced that Ethena's governance token, $ENA, would be the primary target of its DAT strategy. Once the registration statement becomes effective, the company will have the flexibility to issue up to $2 billion in Class A common stock, preferred stock, bonds, warrants, or a combination thereof, to systematically accumulate the governance tokens of leading stablecoins. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Bitwise Expands Cryptocurrency Offerings on Six Swiss Exchange
data.description: According to Foresight News, digital asset management firm Bitwise has launched five new cryptocurrency exchange-traded products (ETPs) on the Six Swiss Exchange. The newly listed ETPs include Bitwise Core Bitcoin ETP, Bitwise Ethereum Staking ETP, Bitwise Solana Staking ETP, Bitwise Physical XRP ETP, and Bitwise MSCI Digital Assets Select 20 ETP. With these additions, Bitwise now offers a total of ten cryptocurrency ETPs on the Six Swiss Exchange.

data.title: Trend Research has transferred one-third of the total NEIROETH to the exchange today
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, Trend Research has transferred one-third of its total NEIROETH to exchanges today. In addition to continuing to transfer NEIROETH to Bybit, they have also begun transferring NEIROETH to Gate. They have already transferred nearly half of their holdings to exchanges today: Previously, they held a total of 670 million NEIROETH (67% of the total), and today they have transferred 324.7 million NEIROETH (worth $22 million) to exchanges. On-chain addresses still hold 34.6% of the total NEIROETH (346 million, valued at $23.16 million).

data.title: Crypto infrastructure provider Fireblocks launches stablecoin payments network
data.description: Crypto infrastructure provider Fireblocks announced the launch of the Fireblocks Network for Payments, a stablecoin payment network designed to help crypto and financial companies more easily transfer stablecoins. The network has attracted over 40 participating institutions, including Bridge, a stablecoin startup acquired by Stripe; stablecoin companies Zerohash and Yellow Card; and Circle, which recently completed its IPO. (Fortune)

data.title: BitFuFu: 408 BTC mined in August, Bitcoin holdings increased to 1,899
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company BitFuFu released an unaudited production and mining operations update for August 2025, revealing that the company mined 408 BTC last month (353 BTC from cloud mining and 55 BTC from self-mining). Its Bitcoin holdings have increased to 1,899, an increase of 115 BTC from July 31, 2025. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Stuttgart Stock Exchange Launches Blockchain-Based Settlement Platform
data.description: According to Foresight News, the Stuttgart Stock Exchange has introduced a blockchain-based pan-European settlement platform named Seturion. This initiative aims to streamline the fragmented post-trade systems for tokenized assets and reduce settlement costs by up to 90%. The platform is accessible to banks, brokers, traditional and digital exchanges, as well as tokenization platforms. It is currently operational on the BX Digital platform, which is regulated by the Swiss Financial Market Supervisory Authority (FINMA) and utilizes distributed ledger technology (DLT).

data.title: Trump's second son: American Bitcoin will soon release several important announcements
data.description: Eric Trump, the second son of Trump, posted on the X platform that American Bitcoin Company is just getting started and will soon release several important announcements.

data.title: RedStone acquires DeFi credit rating platform Credora
data.description: RedStone, a blockchain data oracle service provider, announced the acquisition of Credora, a DeFi credit rating platform, for an undisclosed amount. Credora has previously received investments from institutions such as Coinbase Ventures, S&P, and Hashkey. Following the acquisition, Credora will continue to operate under the "Credora by RedStone" brand, focusing on providing rating services for DeFi assets and yield strategies. (CoinDesk)
